mapper.sql:
select sdte.type_name , shd.user_info_user_info_id_1 , sdse.status_name , shd.smart_device_type_enum_smart_device_type_enum_id_1 , shd.is_on , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , shd.smart_device_id , shd.current_value , shd.room_name , shd.last_update_time , shd.device_name , ui.password , shd.brightness , shd.smart_device_status_enum_smart_device_status_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , ui.username
FROM smart_home_device shd left join smart_device_type_enum sdte on shd.smart_device_type_enum_smart_device_type_enum_id_1 = sdte.smart_device_type_enum_id left join smart_device_status_enum sdse on shd.smart_device_status_enum_smart_device_status_enum_id_1 = sdse.smart_device_status_enum_id left join user_info ui on shd.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
mapper.select:
select sdte.type_name , shd.user_info_user_info_id_1 , sdse.status_name , shd.smart_device_type_enum_smart_device_type_enum_id_1 , shd.is_on , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , shd.smart_device_id , shd.current_value , shd.room_name , shd.last_update_time , shd.device_name , ui.password , shd.brightness , shd.smart_device_status_enum_smart_device_status_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , ui.username
FROM smart_home_device shd left join
smart_device_type_enum
sdte on shd.smart_device_type_enum_smart_device_type_enum_id_1 = sdte.smart_device_type_enum_id left join
smart_device_status_enum
sdse on shd.smart_device_status_enum_smart_device_status_enum_id_1 = sdse.smart_device_status_enum_id left join
user_info
ui on shd.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
